subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God and the God of all who dwell in the heavens and on earth! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و اله من فی السموات و الارض اسئلک باسمک الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
